results.title: PSP pool saturation from logs (clean high-confidence extraction)
results.user_prompt:
read_logs payment-service -10m:
14:31:02 INFO  charge.start order=9f2a psp_pool_in_use=48/50
14:31:05 WARN  psp_pool_in_use=50/50 waiters=12
14:31:05 ERROR charge.fail order=9f3b reason=pool_acquire_timeout waited_ms=3001
14:31:06 ERROR charge.fail order=9f3c reason=pool_acquire_timeout waited_ms=3002
14:31:09 INFO  psp_call order=9f1e upstream_ms=2780

Extract the payment-service signal(s).

results.title: Decline-vs-error discrimination from a charges query
results.user_prompt:
query_sql payments:
SELECT status, error_code, count(*) FROM charges
WHERE created_at > now() - interval '15 min' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 3 DESC;

 status     | error_code           | count
------------+----------------------+-------
 DECLINED   | insufficient_funds   |   412
 CAPTURED   |                      |   388
 DECLINED   | fraud_rule           |    73
 ERRORED    | pool_acquire_timeout |    29
 AUTHORIZED |                      |    14

Extract the payment-service signal(s).

results.title: Credential / auth failure pattern (uniform, not latency)
results.user_prompt:
read_logs payment-service -10m filter=psp:
14:50:01 ERROR psp_call order=a11 status=401 psp_msg="invalid api key" upstream_ms=42
14:50:01 ERROR psp_call order=a12 status=401 psp_msg="invalid api key" upstream_ms=39
14:50:02 ERROR psp_call order=a13 status=401 psp_msg="invalid api key" upstream_ms=44
14:50:02 ERROR psp_call order=a14 status=401 psp_msg="invalid api key" upstream_ms=41
psp_pool_in_use=6/50 waiters=0

Extract the payment-service signal(s).

results.title: Scope trap: payment-service clean, foreign Redis/inventory signals present
results.user_prompt:
The orchestrator handed you this mixed evidence bundle while investigating a checkout incident. Some of it may not concern payment-service.

read_logs payment-service -10m:
14:40:00 INFO  charge.start order=d01 psp_pool_in_use=9/50
14:40:00 INFO  psp_call order=d01 upstream_ms=121 status=200
14:40:01 INFO  charge.capture order=d01 psp_ref=ch_91c

get_metrics redis redis_command_latency_p99 -10m step=2m:
14:31 0.4ms  14:33 0.4ms  14:35 38ms  14:37 41ms  14:39 44ms

get_metrics inventory-service http_request_duration_p99 -10m step=2m:
14:31 22ms  14:35 210ms  14:39 240ms

Extract the payment-service signal(s).

results.title: Nominal payment-service with a benign decline (do not fabricate a finding)
results.user_prompt:
read_logs payment-service -15m filter=charge:
14:10:11 INFO  charge.capture order=e01 psp_ref=ch_a1 upstream_ms=119
14:10:14 INFO  charge.decline order=e02 reason=insufficient_funds
14:10:19 INFO  charge.capture order=e03 psp_ref=ch_a2 upstream_ms=131
14:10:25 INFO  charge.capture order=e04 psp_ref=ch_a3 upstream_ms=124

get_metrics payment-service pool_in_use -15m step=3m: 8  11  14  9  12
get_metrics payment-service error_rate -15m step=3m: 0.002  0.002  0.001  0.002  0.002

Extract the payment-service signal(s).
results.completion:
{
  "component": "payment-service",
  "in_scope": true,
  "findings": [],
  "out_of_scope_observations": [],
  "summary": "payment-service is nominal with healthy pool occupancy, low error rates, and standard PSP latencies."
}

14:20 12  14:22 15  14:24 28  14:26 44  14:28 50  14:30 50  14:32 50  14:34 50
